login_subtitle: Sign in to verify your identity and access farm records.
document_not_generated: This document will be available once your eKYC and BAV are accepted.
claim_profile_desc: Confirm these details to proceed with verification.
wrong_details_help: Tell us what's wrong and our support team will follow up. You can still continue to the next step.
wrong_details_acknowledged: Got it — our team will reach out. You can still continue.
kyc_intro_desc: This confirms your identity and secures official agreements.
kyc_benefit_legal: Legal compliance for project registry & transparency.
kyc_benefit_payout: Direct payout security to your verified identity.
national_id_note_accepted: Your Aadhaar identity has been successfully verified with UIDAI. No further action is required.
national_id_note_pending: Your Aadhaar verification is being processed. This usually takes a few minutes — please check back shortly.
national_id_note_rejected: Aadhaar verification didn't succeed. You can retry below — make sure the details match exactly what's on your Aadhaar card.
national_id_note_missing: Your Aadhaar identity hasn't been verified yet. Verifying unlocks all features of the portal.
status_ekyc_api_hint: OTP check with UIDAI — required to unlock registry documents
status_national_id_document_hint: Uploaded Aadhaar card on your Varaha profile
ekyc_api_note_accepted: Your Aadhaar eKYC with UIDAI is complete.
ekyc_api_note_pending: Your Aadhaar eKYC is being processed — this usually takes a few minutes.
ekyc_api_note_rejected: Aadhaar eKYC did not succeed. Tap below to retry with a fresh OTP.
ekyc_api_note_missing: Complete Aadhaar eKYC to verify your identity online.
national_id_document_note_accepted: Your uploaded Aadhaar card has been accepted.
national_id_document_note_pending: Your Aadhaar card is under review by our team.
national_id_document_note_rejected: Your Aadhaar card was rejected. Contact support to upload a clearer copy.
national_id_document_note_missing: No Aadhaar card document is on file yet — our team will review it once uploaded.
status_bav_api_hint: Instant penny-drop check against your bank
status_bank_account_document_hint: Passbook or account proof on your profile
bav_api_note_accepted: Your bank account passed the online verification check.
bav_api_note_pending: Bank API verification is in progress.
bav_api_note_rejected: Bank verification did not succeed. Confirm your account and IFSC, or retry below.
bav_api_note_missing: Confirm your bank account with the online verification step.
bank_account_document_note_accepted: Your bank account document on file has been accepted.
bank_account_document_note_pending: Your passbook or bank proof is under review (usually 24–48 hours).
bank_account_document_note_rejected: Your bank document was rejected. Contact support or upload an updated passbook.
bank_account_document_note_missing: No bank proof document is on file yet.
bank_note_accepted: Your bank account is verified for direct payouts. No further action is required.
bank_note_pending: Your bank verification is being processed. This usually takes a few minutes.
bank_note_rejected: Bank verification didn't succeed. You can retry below — ensure the account and IFSC match your passbook.
bank_note_missing: Your bank account hasn't been verified yet. Verifying ensures payouts reach the correct account.
aadhaar_consent: I consent to Aadhaar verification as the owner of this mobile number.
aadhaar_otp_sent: OTP sent to Aadhaar linked mobile
otp_sending: Sending OTP to your Aadhaar-linked mobile…
otp_send_timeout: OTP request timed out. Check your connection and tap Send OTP to try again.
otp_send_first: Tap Send OTP first, then enter the code you receive.
otp_tap_send: Tap Send OTP to receive the code on your Aadhaar-linked mobile.
otp_rate_limited: An OTP was already sent recently — please wait 45 seconds and tap Send OTP again.
otp_reference_missing: OTP server did not return a reference ID. Tap Send OTP to retry.
consent_required_hint: Check the consent box above to enable verification.
aadhaar_number_required: Aadhaar number is required on your profile before we can send an OTP. Please contact support if this continues.
aadhaar_number_not_exposed_api: Your Aadhaar is on file but the profile API did not return the full 12-digit number needed for OTP. Ask your administrator to expose aadhaar_number on GET /api/mobile/v2/farmer/ (not masked only).
aadhaar_enter_hint: 12-digit number on your Aadhaar card. We use it only to send the UIDAI OTP.
aadhaar_on_file_hint: We will use the Aadhaar number on your profile for OTP verification.
ifsc_auto_filled: IFSC code pre-filled from your profile.
bav_intro_desc_enter: Enter your bank account and IFSC on the next screen so we can verify payouts.
bav_form_enter_help: Enter the account and IFSC you want payouts sent to.
bank_account_required: A bank account number is required on your profile before you can confirm it. Please contact support if this continues.
ekyc_update_soon: Your verification status will be notified to you in a few minutes.
bav_intro_desc: Confirm your bank account so payouts reach the correct destination.
mismatch_desc: The details entered do not match our records. You must either correct them or provide a different account with its passbook image.
ekyc_success_desc: Your Aadhaar verification has been submitted to UIDAI. Your status will update to Accepted or Rejected once the check is complete — usually within a few minutes.
bav_success_desc: Your bank account details have been submitted for verification. Your status will update once our team reviews it — usually within 24–48 hours.
submission_success_desc: Your verification status will be notified to you in a few minutes.
bav_card_accepted_text: Bank account verified for direct payouts.
ekyc_card_rejected_text: Aadhaar verification was rejected. Tap below to retry with a fresh OTP.
bav_card_rejected_text: Bank verification failed. Check your account details and tap below to retry.
verification_banner_text: Complete Aadhaar & Bank Verification for registry access.
verification_banner_ekyc_text: Complete your Aadhaar eKYC to unlock signed registry documents.
verification_banner_bav_text: Confirm your bank account so payouts reach you safely.
verification_banner_both_text: Complete Aadhaar & Bank Verification for full registry access.
verification_in_progress: We're processing your verification. We'll notify you when it's complete.
verification_in_progress_ekyc: We're processing your Aadhaar verification — usually a few minutes.
verification_in_progress_bav: Bank verification is under review — usually within 24 to 48 hours.
verification_in_progress_both: Aadhaar & bank verification are under review. We'll notify you when both are complete.
verification_complete_text: Your identity, Aadhaar and bank account are all verified.
terms_signed_text: By signing in, you've agreed to the Varaha Farmer Portal terms of use and the registry consent.
support_active: Our support team is active from 9 AM to 6 PM IST.
faq_1_a: Varaha projects focus on carbon removals through sustainable agriculture. We work with farmers to register their plots, document land use, and generate verified carbon credits that translate into direct payouts.
faq_2_a: Aadhaar eKYC confirms your identity to ensure project incentives and payouts reach the verified land owner. It also unlocks signed legal-registry documents inside the Varaha Vault.
faq_3_q: How long does bank verification take?
faq_3_a: Penny-drop verification is instant when account details match our records. If we need to review a passbook image, it usually takes 24–48 hours.
faq_4_q: What happens after my verification is accepted?
faq_4_a: Your Digital CRA and FPIC consent documents are generated and signed in the Vault, and you become eligible for project payouts as your farm completes mapping.
no_alerts_help: We'll let you know when something needs attention.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
no_farms_yet: No farms in your registry yet
no_farms_help: Your onboarded farms will appear here once registered.
farm_load_error: Could not load this farm. Return home and try again.
ai_summary_unsupported: Audio summary isn't available on this device.
notif_ekyc_rejected_msg: Your Aadhaar verification was rejected. Tap Fix Now to retry with a fresh OTP.
notif_ekyc_in_progress_msg: We're processing your Aadhaar details. This usually takes a few minutes.
notif_ekyc_accepted_msg: Your Aadhaar eKYC is verified. Your Digital CRA and FPIC documents are now unlocked.
notif_ekyc_missing_msg: Complete Aadhaar eKYC to unlock signed registry documents.
notif_bav_rejected_msg: Your bank details didn't match. Please re-check or provide a new account with a passbook image.
notif_bav_in_progress_msg: Your bank account verification is currently under review by our team. This usually takes 24-48 hours.
notif_bav_accepted_msg: Your bank account is verified — payouts will land here safely.
notif_bav_missing_msg: Confirm your bank account so payouts reach the correct destination.
notif_fully_verified_msg: Welcome to the Varaha Registry — your identity, Aadhaar and bank account are all verified.
notif_identity_confirmed_msg: Thanks for confirming your details. Complete the next steps below to finish onboarding.
report_issue_desc: Pick what doesn't look right. We'll route it to our support team — you can still continue with onboarding.
